records.ety: [L. pars a part; pars orationis a part of speech. See Part, n.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. parsed (pärst); p. pr. & vb. n. parsing.]

defs: To resolve into its elements, as a sentence, pointing out the several parts of speech, and their relation to each other by government or agreement; to analyze and describe grammatically.
quotes: Let him construe the letter into English, and parse it over perfectly.
